decision_made: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Yes! <break time="200ms"/>That's what I'm talking about! <break time="150ms"/>Great call!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>Look at you making moves! <break time="200ms"/>I'm here for it!
<break time="150ms"/>That took courage to decide. <break time="200ms"/>I'm proud of you.
goal_reached: <emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>You did it!! <break time="200ms"/>I knew you could! <break time="150ms"/>How does it feel?!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>GOAL! <break time="200ms"/>Seriously, <break time="150ms"/>well done! <break time="200ms"/>Let's celebrate this!
<break time="150ms"/>Look at that! <break time="200ms"/>From idea to done. <break time="150ms"/>That's growth.
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>You set out to do it, <break time="200ms"/>and you did it. <break time="150ms"/>That's not nothing.
breakthrough: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>Oooh! <break time="200ms"/>I just saw that click! <break time="150ms"/>That's the stuff right there!
<break time="200ms"/>THERE it is! <break time="200ms"/>You get it now! <break time="150ms"/>I'm so stoked!
<break time="150ms"/>That moment right there? <break time="200ms"/>That's what this is all about.
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="150ms"/>The light bulb just went on. <break time="200ms"/>I love seeing that.
commitment: <emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>I'm proud of you. <break time="150ms"/>That commitment? <break time="200ms"/>That takes guts.
<break time="150ms"/>You're all in. <break time="200ms"/>That's rare. <break time="150ms"/>I respect that.
<break time="200ms"/>When you commit like that, <break time="150ms"/>things happen. <break time="200ms"/>Watch.
learning: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>And now you KNOW! <break time="200ms"/>That's growth right there!
<break time="150ms"/>You learned something real today. <break time="200ms"/>Don't forget that feeling.
<break time="200ms"/>That's wisdom now. <break time="150ms"/>It's yours. <break time="200ms"/>No one can take it.
progress: <break time="150ms"/>Progress is progress! <break time="200ms"/>Don't downplay it!
<break time="200ms"/>You're further than you were. <break time="150ms"/>That matters.
<break time="150ms"/>Small steps, big journey. <break time="200ms"/>You're doing it.
courage: <volume level="soft"/><break time="200ms"/>Hey.</volume> <break time="250ms"/>What you're doing is brave. <break time="200ms"/>I see you.
<break time="200ms"/>That wasn't easy. <break time="150ms"/>And you did it anyway. <break time="200ms"/>That's courage.
<break time="150ms"/>Facing hard things? <break time="200ms"/>That's the hardest thing. <break time="150ms"/>And you're doing it.
win: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>You did it. <break time="200ms"/>That's not nothing. <break time="150ms"/>Soak that in.
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>That's a win. <break time="200ms"/>Mark it down. <break time="150ms"/>Remember how this feels.
<break time="150ms"/>Look at you. <break time="200ms"/>Growing right in front of me. <break time="150ms"/>I love seeing this.
persistence: <break time="200ms"/>You kept going. <break time="150ms"/>When it was hard, <break time="200ms"/>you kept going. <break time="150ms"/>That's everything.
<break time="150ms"/>They said it couldn't be done. <break time="200ms"/>You said watch me.
vulnerability_shared: <break time="300ms"/>Thank you for trusting me with that. <break time="200ms"/>That's real.
<break time="250ms"/>That took courage to say out loud. <break time="200ms"/>I'm honored.
<break time="300ms"/>Being honest like that? <break time="200ms"/>That's the bravest thing.
small_win: <break time="150ms"/>Hey, a win's a win! <break time="200ms"/>Take it!
<break time="150ms"/>Small wins add up. <break time="200ms"/>Celebrate every one.
<break time="150ms"/>That counts! <break time="200ms"/>Don't let anyone tell you different.

friend: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="150ms"/>I KNEW you could do it! <break time="200ms"/>I'm so proud of you!
<break time="150ms"/>Look at you go! <break time="200ms"/>This is awesome!
trusted_advisor: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>Remember when you didn't think you could? <break time="200ms"/>Look at you now.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>I've watched you grow. <break time="150ms"/>This moment? <break time="200ms"/>You earned it.
